description: Updates a workflow preset for a company tool.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the workflow preset

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow preset

valid.description: If true, this preset has a valid configuration and is ready to use for new instances

default.description: If true, this preset will be used by default for this tool

created_at.description: Date when the preset was created

updated_at.description: Date when the preset was last updated

id.description: Unique identifier of the workflow template

last_published_version_id.description: Unique identifier of the latest published version of the template

id.description: Unique identifier for the workflow manager
Unique identifier for the distribution list

responsible_group_memberships.description: Associations between assignees and responsible groups

default.description: Indicates if this is the default preset
